---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

::: {.cv-header}
![](assets/profile.jpg){.profile-photo}

::: {.cv-header-text}
::: {.cv-name}
Chansu Han, Ph.D.
:::

::: {.cv-role}
Researcher, NICT, Japan
:::

::: {.cv-role-sub}
Visiting Assistant Professor, Kyushu University
:::

::: {.cv-affiliation}
CREATE / Cybersecurity Laboratory, NICT
:::

::: {.cv-contact}
**Contact:** han (at) nict.go.jp
:::

::: {.cv-links}
[![Google Scholar](assets/icons/scholar.png){.link-icon} Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZvvIWZ4AAAAJ&hl=en) ·
[![ResearchGate](assets/icons/researchgate.png){.link-icon} ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Chansu-Han-2) ·
[![dblp](assets/icons/dblp.png){.link-icon} dblp](https://dblp.org/pid/186/6829.html)

[![Semantic Scholar](assets/icons/semanticscholar.png){.link-icon} Semantic Scholar](https://www.semanticscholar.org/author/Chansu-Han/3467047) ·
[![Web of Science](assets/icons/wos.png){.link-icon} Web of Science](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/K-3263-2019)

[![ORCID](assets/icons/orcid.png){.link-icon} ORCID: 0000-0002-1728-5300](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1728-5300) ·
[![LinkedIn](assets/icons/linkedin.png){.link-icon} LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/chansu-han-aa0857193/)
:::

::: {.cv-download}
[Download CV (PDF)](Chansu_Han_CV.pdf){.btn-pdf target="_blank"}
:::
:::
:::

{{< include _content.qmd >}}
